data.title: Jefferies Raises Targets On Uber, Lyft Shares Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: Jefferies analyst John Colantuoni has raised price targets on Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) and Lyft, Inc. (NASDAQ:LYFT) ahead of earnings in the coming weeks. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: Danaher's Q3 Earnings Boosted By Bioprocessing Order Growth, Analyst Maintain Stock Rating
data.description: Danaher posts Q3 sales of $5.79 billion, surpassing expectations. 2024 guidance includes bioprocessing revenue decline and Cepheid respiratory sales of $1.7 billion.

data.title: What's Going On With Netflix Stock?
data.description: Netflix shares are trading higher by 9% over the past week. The stock reached a new 52-week high after reporting strong Q3 results.

data.title: Stock Of The Day: GM Earnings Fuel Breakout, Shares Accelerate Past Key Resistance Level
data.description: Shares of General Motors (GM) appear to be breaking out above the resistance at $50.00. This means a new uptrend may be forming.
